# Milestones

- Repository setup
- README
- Environment example
- Base app/API scaffold
- Initial tests

## Milestone 2: Core Product

- Main data models
- Main user workflows

## Milestone 3: Production Readiness

- CI checks
- Docker support
- Security hardening

- Screenshots and demo notes

## Milestone 4: Portfolio Polish

- Architecture diagram
- Resume bullets

- Portfolio description
- Final cleanup for Student Marketplace API
